diagnostic_precedence.rule: A pack cannot be judged semantically until its slot is known, unique, and required slots are present.
Dependencies are checked before helper-only and ownership checks; helper-only is emitted only for a known non-conflicting slot.
Rule graph errors apply after descriptor identity and pack ownership are valid.

scenario_matrix.scenario: helper pack asks for an unknown slot
scenario_matrix.reason: unknown slot is resolved before helper-only ownership

scenario_matrix.scenario: helper pack collides with an occupied slot
scenario_matrix.reason: duplicate slot is more local and wins before helper-only ownership

scenario_matrix.scenario: helper pack is in a known available slot but owns no capability
scenario_matrix.reason: slot is known and non-conflicting, so semantic capability ownership is now the failing layer
dependency failure wins before rule ownership or registry ordering

scenario_matrix.scenario: temporal pack registers a core-prefixed rule
scenario_matrix.reason: slot/dependency/capability checks passed, but registry entry belongs to another semantic owner

scenario_matrix.scenario: ordered rule references a missing rule
scenario_matrix.reason: ordered registry graph validation catches missing references
cycle is a graph-ordering error after references exist
